title: ApplicationSource
description: Git or Helm chart source for the application manifests.

repoURL.description: URL of the Git repository or Helm chart repository.

path.description: Path within the repository where manifests are located. Used for Git repositories.

targetRevision.description: Git branch, tag, or commit SHA to deploy. Defaults to HEAD.

chart.description: Helm chart name. Used when repoURL points to a Helm registry.

valueFiles.description: List of Helm value file paths.

values.description: Inline Helm values as a YAML string.

namePrefix.description: Prefix to append to all resource names.

nameSuffix.description: Suffix to append to all resource names.

images.description: List of image overrides in name=tag format.
